imageDetailFieldsToggle: Show or hide basic image information
scrollTooFast4: Give the frame rate a break~
scrollTooFast5: Like a rocket! Wait for me~
dedupeDesc: Remove identical images (does not delete files)
dedupeDescDesktop: Remove images with identical hash in database
removeMissingDesc: Remove images whose source file no longer exists
removeMissingDescDesktop: Remove images whose source file no longer exists in database
removeUnrecognizedDesc: Remove records when the file still exists on disk but its extension or type is not recognized as a supported image or video
removeUnrecognizedDescDesktop: Remove records whose local file exists but is not recognized as supported media
removeUnrecognizedSlowHint: Note: this reads each file to detect type and will significantly slow down organizing.
organizeRangeDesc: The gallery has {total} images. Drag to choose the index range to process in this run (minimum span 1000)
deleteSourceFilesDesc: After removing database records, delete the corresponding files from disk
deleteSourceFilesDescDesktop: Only applies to source files for images removed in this run
safeDeleteDesc: Only delete a file if no other database row still references the same path
safeDeleteSlowHint: May be slower: queries the database per path
byWallpaperSetAsc: By last set as wallpaper (oldest first)
byWallpaperSetDesc: By last set as wallpaper (newest first)
wallpaperOrderEmptyTip: No image has been set as desktop wallpaper yet.
galleryPathLoadFailedClearFilters: The current path failed to load. All filters and search have been cleared automatically.
selectImageDesc: Select one or more images from gallery
selectVideoDesc: Select one or more videos from gallery
localDesc: Import from local: images, videos or folders
remoteDesc: Use plugins to collect images from network
organizeNoNewDownloadHint: No newly downloaded items are added during organizing. Progress only reflects the scope captured when this run started.
organizeDone: Organize done: removed {removed} images, regenerated {regenerated} thumbnails
weProjectNamePrompt: Enter WE project name (leave empty for default)
weDirNotConfigured: Wallpaper Engine directory not configured. Go to Settings -> Wallpaper rotation -> Wallpaper Engine directory
removeDialogCheckboxLabel: Also delete image files (use with caution)
removeDialogDangerText: Warning: Files will be permanently deleted and removed from all albums and gallery. This cannot be undone!
removeDialogSafeText: If unchecked, images are only removed from this album; files and entries in other albums are kept.
removeDialogMessageSingle: This image will be removed from the current album.
removeDialogMessageMulti: These {count} images will be removed from the current album.
deleteDialogMessageSingle: This image file will be permanently deleted and removed from all albums and gallery. This cannot be undone.
deleteDialogMessageMulti: These {count} image files will be permanently deleted and removed from all albums and gallery. This cannot be undone.
removeDialogWallpaperHint: Note: Selection includes the current wallpaper. Remove/delete will not change the desktop wallpaper immediately, but it will not be available after next launch.
deletedAndRemovedSuccess: Deleted (removed from all albums and gallery)
deletedAndRemovedCountSuccess: Deleted {count} images (removed from all albums and gallery)
removeFromGalleryMessageSingle: This image will be permanently deleted (including the local file). This cannot be undone. Use "Hide" if you want to keep the file.
removeFromGalleryMessageMulti: These {count} images will be permanently deleted (including local files). This cannot be undone. Use "Hide" if you want to keep the files.
